metadata.description: Base workload name, e.g. "interview".
Environment moniker: "dev", "test", or "prod".
Azure region for all resources.
App Service plan SKU name.
Number of workers for the App Service plan.
Linux runtime stack in <RUNTIME>|<VERSION> format.
Extra tags merged into the resource defaults.
Enable Key Vault purge protection. Irreversible once set. Set true for prod to prevent permanent secret loss.
Name of the Key Vault.
Speech account name, should be globally unique.
Azure Speech SKU for dev/test/prod.
Azure OpenAI account name, should be globally unique.
GitHub OAuth client id for ASP.NET Core authentication.
Enable Azure OpenAI resource deployment and runtime app settings wiring.
Azure OpenAI SKU.
Whether to deploy a model inside the Azure OpenAI account.
List of Azure OpenAI model deployments. Each item should contain: name, modelName, modelVersion, deploymentSkuName, deploymentCapacity.
Base workload name, e.g. "interview".
Environment moniker, e.g. "dev", "test", "prod".
Azure region for all resources.
App Service plan SKU name. The tier is derived automatically.
Number of workers for the plan.
Extra tags merged into the defaults.

appSettings.value: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'Authentication__CookieName', 'value', 'InterviewSimulator.Auth'), createObject('name', 'Authentication__GitHub__ClientId', 'value', parameters('githubOAuthClientId')), createObject('name', 'Authentication__GitHub__ClientSecret', 'value', format('@Microsoft.KeyVault(VaultName={0};SecretName={1})', parameters('keyVaultName'), variables('githubOAuthClientSecretName'))), createObject('name', 'AzureSpeech__Region', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'speechService'), '2025-04-01').outputs.speechRegion.value), createObject('name', 'AzureSpeech__Endpoint', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'speechService'), '2025-04-01').outputs.speechEndpoint.value), createObject('name', 'AzureSpeech__TokenEndpoint', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'speechService'), '2025-04-01').outputs.speechTokenEndpoint.value), createObject('name', 'AzureSpeech__Key', 'value', format('@Microsoft.KeyVault(VaultName={0};SecretName=azure-speech-key)', parameters('keyVaultName')))), if(parameters('enableAzureOpenAI'), concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'AzureOpenAI__Endpoint', 'value', format('https://{0}.openai.azure.com/', parameters('openAIAccountName'))), createObject('name', 'AzureOpenAI__DefaultDeploymentName', 'value', variables('effectiveOpenAIDeploymentName'))), variables('openAIDeploymentNameAppSettings')), createArray()))]

metadata.description: Base workload name, e.g. "interview".
Environment moniker, e.g. "dev", "test", "prod".
Deterministic suffix used to keep App Service names globally unique.
Azure region for all resources.
Resource ID of the App Service plan to host this app.
Linux runtime stack in <RUNTIME>|<VERSION> format.
Enable AlwaysOn for the web app. Disable for Free (F1) tier plans.
Enable client affinity (ARR). Normally false for APIs.
Deploy app as a run-from-package (zip deploy). Set false if using other deployment methods.
Additional app settings as an array of {name, value} objects.
Connection strings (each object requires name, type, value).
Application Insights connection string for telemetry. Leave empty to disable.
Extra tags merged into the defaults.

variables.defaultAppSettings: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT', 'value', 'Production'), createObject('name', 'APP_ENVIRONMENT', 'value', variables('normalizedEnvironment')), createObject('name', 'ASPNETCORE_FORWARDEDHEADERS_ENABLED', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'SCM_DO_BUILD_DURING_DEPLOYMENT', 'value', 'false')), if(parameters('runFromPackage'), createArray(createObject('name', 'WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE', 'value', '1')), createArray()), if(not(empty(parameters('applicationInsightsConnectionString'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', parameters('applicationInsightsConnectionString'))), createArray()))]

metadata.description: Base workload name, e.g. "interview".
Environment moniker, e.g. "dev", "test", "prod".
Azure region.
Retention period in days for Log Analytics. Default 30, max 730.
Extra tags merged into the defaults.
Name of the Key Vault
Location for Key Vault
Key-value pairs of secrets to create in the Key Vault. Example: { "sql-admin-password": "yourpass", "api-key": "yourkey" }
Enable purge protection. Irreversible once set — recommended for prod to prevent accidental permanent deletion.
Principal IDs (object IDs) to grant the Key Vault Secrets User role. Typically includes the App Service managed identity.
Name of the Services account for Azure Speech Services. Must be globally unique.
Environment moniker, e.g. "dev", "test", "prod".
Azure region for the Speech resource.
Azure Speech SKU. Use F0 for dev if available; otherwise use S0.
Whether public network access is enabled. Keep Enabled for dev.
Disable local/key authentication. Must be false if using Speech keys.
Extra tags merged into the defaults.
Name of the Azure OpenAI account. Must be globally unique.
Environment moniker, e.g. "dev", "test", "prod".
Azure region for the OpenAI resource.
Azure OpenAI SKU.
Whether to create an Azure OpenAI model deployment in this module.
List of model deployments. When deployModel=true, each object should contain name, modelName, modelVersion, deploymentSkuName, and deploymentCapacity.
Extra tags merged into the defaults.
Principal IDs (object IDs) to grant the Cognitive Services OpenAI User role. Typically includes the App Service managed identity.
